fields.description: Whether the caller explicitly consented to recording.
Whether the caller agreed that the final readback was accurate; this never locks the job.
Requested move date in YYYY-MM-DD form.
Whether the requested move date is flexible.
Allowed origin locality summary exactly as stated; city/state only in real_redacted mode.
Exact canonical origin dwelling value: apartment, condo, townhouse, house, storage_unit, or other. Leave unset when unknown; never return free text.
Number of origin floors involved in the move.
Number of origin stair flights involved.
Whether an elevator is available at the origin.
Estimated origin parking-to-door carry distance in feet.
Allowed destination locality summary exactly as stated; city/state only in real_redacted mode.
Exact canonical destination dwelling value: apartment, condo, townhouse, house, storage_unit, or other. Leave unset when unknown; never return free text.
Number of destination floors involved in the move.
Number of destination stair flights involved.
Whether an elevator is available at the destination.
Estimated destination parking-to-door carry distance in feet.
Number of bedrooms included in the move.
JSON list of objects using exactly name, quantity, and room for every caller-stated item. Use room=Unspecified when the caller does not provide a room.
JSON string list of oversized, fragile, heavy, or high-value items.
Whether packing service was requested.
Whether disassembly service was requested.
Whether storage service was requested.
Requested storage duration in days; collect only when storage is requested.
Protection or insurance preference exactly as stated.
